svg.title: Turn loop detail
svg.desc: One turn in detail. The orchestrator reads a State-in card of fields, emits a select_speaker action, the chosen participant contributes as either an agent or a human, and the finalized contribution produces both a Message and an Event. A dashed turn-plus-one arrow loops back to the state, otherwise the dialogue exits to a terminal status.
svg.text: each turn produces one Message + one Event, then loops unless terminated
